description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden cabin with a prominent gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic appearance, and the base is finished with a gray trim. The cabin features several rectangular windows with wooden frames, arranged in groups on the longer sides, and a single door with a small step on one facade. The roof has a moderate overhang, providing some protection to the windows and door below. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for residential or recreational use in an urban or suburban setting.
description: A compact wooden cabin with a gable roof, grouped rectangular windows, and a single front door, finished in warm brown tones.
description_view_0: End view showing the gable roof, three grouped rectangular windows, and wood plank siding.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the main entrance door with a step, two windows, and the full length of the tiled roof.
description_view_2: Opposite end view with a gable roof and plain wood siding, no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Side view with three grouped windows and uninterrupted wood siding, no door present.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs, covered in reddish-brown ceramic tiles
attribute_window_arrangement: Three small rectangular windows grouped together on each end, two rectangular windows spaced apart on the side with the door, and three grouped windows on the opposite side; all windows are symmetrically arranged and framed in wood
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the long side of the cabin, offset to the left, with a small step beneath it
